input.text: 6-month internship at CloudForge Pty Ltd for Junior Software Engineer. Duties: implement REST APIs, write unit tests, fix production bugs, and participate in sprint planning. Supervised by Senior Engineer (name and email provided). Paid role with formal contract.
Intern role: Social Media Coordinator at a startup. Duties include creating Instagram reels, scheduling posts, influencer outreach, and analytics reporting. No software development tasks.

concerns: Role focus is marketing/content rather than computing or engineering practice.

input.text: One-week part-time internship (total around 20 hours) for IT assistant tasks. Employer and supervisor are genuine.

concerns: Placement duration/hours appear insufficient for internship learning outcomes.

input.text: Frontend internship in a small business. Candidate reports directly to office admin; no technical supervisor or mentor identified.

concerns: No clear technical supervision structure is provided.

cases.name: Borderline fail-safe - vague role and unclear employer legitimacy

input.text: Remote role advertised by 'Global Digital Group'. Duties listed as 'assist team as required' and 'various online tasks'. No company website, ABN, or formal contract terms provided.

concerns: Employer legitimacy and role specificity are not sufficiently evidenced.

input.text: 12-week paid internship with SecureNet Australia. Tasks include SIEM alert triage, log analysis, vulnerability reporting, and scripting for detection improvements. Supervised by Security Operations Lead with daily check-ins.
